snippet.title: PSG 0-1 Bayern Munich. ¬°PARTIDAZO! Neymar, Mbapp√© y Keylor eliminan al CAMPE√ďN. | Champions League
snippet.description: En un partido de idas y vueltas, el PSG pudo asegurar su boleto a las semifinales de la UEFA Champions League. El Bayern Munich termin√≥ ganando de visita 1-0, pero no le alcanz√≥ por el 3-2 conseguido por el Paris Saint-Germain en el juego de ida. Neymar lider√≥ el ataque parisino, jugando un partido excelente al cual solo le falt√≥ su gol. El Tico Keylor Navas fue nuevamente clave en limitar a los alemanes a un solo gol. El Bayern es el tercer campe√≥n consecutivo en quedarse eliminado antes de las semis en la Liga de Campeones. El PSG, avanz√≥ a las semifinales por tercera vez en su historia. #ChampionsLeague | PSG vs Bayern Munich

snippet.title: Justin Bieber - Live from Paris (Livestream)
snippet.description:
Against the breathtaking backdrop of the City Of Lights, and from the lush ruins of a vacant but majestic Parisian hotel, Justin Bieber brings his new album Justice to life with five stunning performances, four of them live debuts. This fifteen minute special brings fans directly into Justin‚Äôs world and opens the doors to his powerful new album.

that's never heard

put in a frame

that's never heard

that's never heard

snippet.description:

Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! ‚Ėļ‚Ėļ https://supr.cl/subscribe

#GoldarmGang #Brawlstars #Belle

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don‚Äôt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team‚Äôs safe and try to crack open your opponents‚Äô. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you‚Äôre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support ‚ÄĒ or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

http://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.title: Space Jam: Una Nueva Era - Trailer 1
snippet.description:
¬°Bienvenidos al partido del siglo! El campe√≥n de la NBA e √≠cono mundial LeBron James se embarca en una aventura √©pica junto a Bugs Bunny con el evento animado / de acci√≥n en vivo "Space Jam: Una Nueva Era‚ÄĚ, del director Malcolm D. Lee y un equipo de cine innovador que incluye a Ryan Coogler y Maverick Carter. Este viaje de transformaci√≥n es una combinaci√≥n man√≠aca de dos mundos que revela hasta d√≥nde llegar√°n algunos padres para conectarse con sus hijos. Cuando LeBron y su peque√Īo hijo Dom quedan atrapados en un espacio digital por una IA deshonesta, LeBron debe llevarlos a casa a salvo liderando a Bugs, Lola Bunny y toda la pandilla de Looney Tunes notoriamente indisciplinados a la victoria sobre los campeones digitalizados de la IA en el cancha: una lista mejorada de estrellas profesionales del baloncesto como nunca antes las hab√≠as visto. Son Tunes versus Goons en el desaf√≠o m√°s importante de su vida, que redefinir√° el v√≠nculo de LeBron con su hijo y arrojar√° luz sobre el poder de ser uno mismo. Las melod√≠as listas para la acci√≥n destruyen las convenciones, potencian sus talentos √ļnicos y sorprenden incluso al "Rey" James jugando el juego a su manera.

James protagoniza junto al nominado al Oscar Don Cheadle (las pel√≠culas de "Los Vengadores", "Hotel Rwanda"), Khris Davis ("Judas y el Mes√≠as Negro", la serie de televisi√≥n "Atlanta"), Sonequa Martin-Green (la serie de televisi√≥n "The Walking Dead", " Star Trek: Discovery ‚ÄĚ), el nuevo talento Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (‚Äú Looney Tunes Cartoons ‚ÄĚ) y Eric Bauza (‚Äú Looney Tunes Cartoons ‚ÄĚ).

Lee (‚ÄúViaje de Chicas‚ÄĚ, ‚ÄúNight School‚ÄĚ) dirige a partir de un gui√≥n de Juel Taylor, Tony Rettenmaier, Keenan Coogler y Terence Nance. Los productores de la pel√≠cula son Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter y Duncan Henderson, y los productores ejecutivos son Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance e Ivan Reitman.

El equipo creativo detr√°s de escena del director incluye al director de fotograf√≠a Salvatore Totino ("Spider-Man: De Regreso a Casa‚ÄĚ), el productor de animaci√≥n Troy Nethercott (‚ÄúParque M√°gico‚ÄĚ), los dise√Īadores de producci√≥n Kevin Ishioka (‚ÄúLa Mula‚ÄĚ), Akin McKenzie ( ‚ÄúAs√≠ nos ven‚ÄĚ de Netflix) y Clint Wallace (pr√≥ximamente "Eternals"), el editor Bob Ducsay (‚ÄúGodzilla II: El Rey de los Monstruos‚ÄĚ, ‚ÄúLa Guerra de las Galaxias, episodio VIII: los √ļltimos Jedi‚ÄĚ)  y la dise√Īadora de vestuario Melissa Bruning  (‚ÄúRampage: devastaci√≥n‚ÄĚ). La m√ļsica es de Kris Bowers (‚ÄúGreen Book: una amistad sin fronteras‚ÄĚ y la serie ‚ÄúBridgerton‚ÄĚ).

Warner Bros. Pictures presenta una producci√≥n de Proximity / The SpringHill Company, una pel√≠cula de Malcolm D. Lee, "Space Jam: Una Nueva Era‚ÄĚ. La pel√≠cula ser√° distribuida mundialmente por Warner Bros. Pictures. Pr√≥ximamente - Solo en Cines.

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! ūüĎÄ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ‚Ėļ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ‚Ėļhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ‚Ėļhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

en.description:

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

snippet.description:

Official Lyrics:

Once the last drop of rain has dried off the pavement
Shouldn't I find a stain, but I never do
The way the tires turn stones, on old county roads
They leave ‚Äėem muddy underneath 
Reminds me of you
You find graffiti on the walls of old bathroom stalls
You know, you can scratch it right off 
It's how it used to be
But like the dollar in your pocket that's been spent and traded in
You can't change where it's been
Reminds me of me

I lived, and I learned
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
I‚Äôve still got you all over me

The best and worst day of June
Was the one that I met you
With your hands in your pockets
And your ‚Äėdon't you wish you had me‚Äô grin
But I did, so I smiled, and I melted like a child
Now every breath of air I breathe reminds me of then

And I lived, and I learned 
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
I‚Äôve still got you all over me

I lived, and I learned 
And found out what it was to turn around
And see, that we 
Were never really meant to be
So I lied, and I cried 
And I watched a part of myself die
Cause no amount of freedom gets you clean
I‚Äôve still got you all over me
I‚Äôve still got you all over me
Still got you all over me

snippet.description:
Benjam√≠n Soria presenta "Benoli", una empresa que elabora palos de escoba a base de desperdicios de aserraderos. Este negocio tiene tanta demanda que ahora busca una inversi√≥n de 80 mil d√≥lares por para incrementar su capacidad de producci√≥n, ¬ŅConseguir√° la inversi√≥n que busca?

#SharkTankMx #Ecolog√≠a #Limpieza #Emprendedores #Inversionistas #M√©xico

¬°Disfruta de los productos que has visto en el Tanque a trav√©s de la tienda oficial de Shark Tank M√©xico! http://www.amazon.com.mx/sharktankmx

Bienvenido al canal oficial de SHARK TANK M√ČXICO, el reality de emprendimiento y negocios que otorga a sus participantes la oportunidad de presentar proyectos de inversi√≥n, con la esperanza de asegurar el respaldo econ√≥mico para su emprendimiento; adem√°s de aprovechar la experiencia que tienen los inversionistas ‚Äď‚Äútiburones‚ÄĚ- para lograr llevar su negocio a un crecimiento exponencial.

Con cinco temporadas, SHARK TANK M√ČXICO ha logrado convertirse en un referente del emprendimiento en el pa√≠s; el programa ha recibido m√°s de 20,000 registros de proyectos para inversi√≥n, de los cuales apenas un 4% ha logrado presentar su ‚Äúpitch‚ÄĚ a los ‚Äėtiburones‚Äô. 

SHARK TANK M√ČXICO es una adaptaci√≥n del reconocido reality Dragons‚Äô Den, creado por Nippon TV en Jap√≥n. Este formato, distribuido por Sony Pictures Television, ha sido adaptado exitosamente en m√°s de 40 pa√≠ses. 

Para m√°s informaci√≥n, visita: 
https://la.sonychannel.com/series/shark-tank-mexico
https://www.instagram.com/sharktankmex/

¬°Acomp√°√Īanos a revivir algunos de los mejores momentos de las diferentes temporadas que se han emitido por Sony Channel!

Las negociaciones entre inversionistas y emprendedores son reales. Los tiburones invierten su propio dinero, a su discreci√≥n. Cualquier acuerdo ante las c√°maras est√° sujeto al correspondiente proceso de debida diligencia por parte de los inversionistas y a que se suscriba un contrato vinculante entre emprendedor y tibur√≥n(es). Toda referencia a la unidad monetaria d√≥lar tiene un prop√≥sito meramente informativo, y corresponde a la realidad del momento en que se realizaron las grabaciones.
